key_finding: K-V DISSOCIATION SURVIVES ENERGY CONFOUND TEST. SNR-controlled noise (matched relative perturbation per head) confirms K genuinely more sensitive than V: avg gap=-21.6pp across 5 SNR levels. V=100% at SNR=-3dB while K=64.7%. The 6.5x energy mismatch (K-norms >> V-norms) is REAL but does NOT explain K>V. Direction replacement equivalent to ~-6dB additive noise. Text accuracy >=99% across all conditions.
evidence_impact: Disconfirmatory challenge to central K-V finding SURVIVED. The routing > throughput interpretation is robust to the energy confound. Pre-registered Scenario A confirmed (40% confidence). The K-V direction dissociation is NOT an artifact of K having larger norms. New finding: direction replacement is more destructive than energy-matched additive noise because it completely destroys directional information.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Replicate SNR-matched K>V on Qwen (confirm cross-model). (2) Fine-grained V breakpoint (-4 to -5 dB) to quantify V headroom. (3) Third model family for K-V dissociation. (4) K-only PGD (exploit K-direction null space). (5) Fixed-noise-std design to test per-head variability.

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG: universal across models. Late positions carry answer info via K-routing

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation SURVIVES ENERGY CONFOUND. K>V at matched SNR (avg gap -21.6pp). Cross-model replicated, energy-artifact-tested

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. R-KV shows removing redundant tokens IMPROVES reasoning

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE dose-response on 2 families + energy confound test. V-mag immunity 149/149. K-V direction ratio 3.6-3.7x. Need 3rd family

encoding_strategy.status: Digital (Qwen: K+V cliffs) vs analog (Llama: K+V gradual). Energy confound tested on Llama — K>V persists at matched SNR

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen (1.1-2.0x). Explained by staggered vs overlapping degradation windows

literature_convergence.status: 5+ independent groups converge. K-V dissociation is novel contribution beyond existing literature. Now energy-confound-tested
